LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER ERNEST BONNER JR.'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 5, 2014. PETITIONER'S ATTEMPT TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S MINUTE ORDER ISSUED ON DECEMBER 18, 2013 PERTAINING TO THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD IS INSUFFICIENT. PETITIONER MUST LODGE THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD IN CONSECUTIVELY NUMBERED THREE RING BINDERS NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 21, 2014. (SEE CRC 3.1110(E).) PLAINTIFF MAY PICK UP FROM DEPARTMENT 302 THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD LODGED ON DECEMBER 11, 2013 AND RE-LODGE IT IN CONSECUTIVELY MARKED THREE RING BINDERS THAT ARE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1110(C), (E) AND (F). JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ERNEST BONNER JR'S 2ND AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED. PETITIONER FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT RESPONDENT'S DECISION. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. (AFTER HEARING, THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORDS (4 VOLS) LODGED ON FEB. 21, 2014 WERE RETURNED TO THE SUBMITTING PARTY, PETITIONER ERNEST BONNER, JR.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ERNEST BONNER JR.'S 1ST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 24, 2014 TO GIVE PETITIONER THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1110(C), (E) AND (F), AND LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF: (1) THE SECOND AMENDED PETITION; (2) HIS MOVING PAPERS AND DECLARATIONS FILED ON OCTOBER 17, 2013; AND (3) THE PRETRIAL BRIEF FILED ON DECEMBER 11 2013 TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 3, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE PETITION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). NO LATER THAN JANUARY 10, 2014 AT 4 PM, PLAINTIFF SHALL LODGE AN ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1110(C), (E) AND (F). "DOCUMENTS BOUND TOGETHER MUST BE CONSECUTIVELY PAGINATED." (CRC 3.1110(C).) "ALL PAGES OF EACH DOCUMENT AND EXHIBIT MUST BE ATTACHED TOGETHER AT THE TOP BY A METHOD THAT PERMITS PAGES TO BE EASILY TURNED AND THE ENTIRE CONTENT OF EACH PAGE TO BE READ." (CRC 3.1110(E).) "EACH EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY A HARD 8 1/2 X 11 SHEET WITH HARD PAPER OR PLASTIC TABS EXTENDING BELOW THE BOTTOM OF THE PAGE, BEARING THE EXHIBIT DESIGNATION." (CRC 3.1110(F).) "AN INDEX TO EXHIBITS MUST BE PROVIDED." (IBID.) PLAINTIFF MAY PICK UP FROM DEPARTMENT 302 THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD LODGED ON DECEMBER 11, 2013 AND RE-LODGE IT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1110(C), (E) AND (F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185
